author: marcopolo__
content: Anything folks want to chat about synchronously? Otherwise I'd suggest we post async updates.

author: danielknopik
content:
For LH: Now that more nodes on hoodi are updated, we start seeing some benefits :)

On Australian nodes, total node bandwidth average has dropped from around 3MiB/s to 2MiB/s, which is pretty nice. Also, all nodes are now clustered more tightly wrt data availability delay, basically removing the 200ms Australia penalty.

The benefits are not as pronounced on our European nodes.

There is also a fix we are going include into a patch release soon, <@1425510242749251606> you might want to check if you have a similar bug https://github.com/sigp/lighthouse/pull/9604

author: .just_kk
content: btw, we measured the number of nodes with partial messages enabled (not only gossipsub 1.3 support). On hoodi the estimate is ~150 nodes (out of ~2000 nodes)
